name: Tonda Curry

contactInfo.office: 121 E. Dallas St., Suite 300, Canton, TX 75103

bio: Tonda Curry serves as the District Attorney for Van Zandt County, leading felony prosecutions in the Canton area. She is committed to ensuring justice and public safety for Van Zandt County communities.
campaignPromises: Aggressively prosecute violent and property crimes
Combat the drug epidemic in Van Zandt County
Advocate for victims' rights in the criminal justice system
Maintain transparency and efficiency in the DA's office
Partner with local law enforcement to protect the community
